page_metadata.biotools__summary: Enrichment of metabolomics data using KEGG entries. Given a set of affected compounds, FELLA suggests affected reactions, enzymes, modules and pathways using label propagation in a knowledge model network. The resulting subnetwork can be visualised and exported.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Enrichment of metabolomics data using KEGG entries. Given a set of affected compounds, FELLA suggests affected reactions, enzymes, modules and pathways using label propagation in a knowledge model network. The resulting subnetwork can be visualised and exported.
